case_title: AGNIESZKA WORONIECKA ET AL VS. SHAHLA BOLBOLAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORONIECKA, AGNIESZKA MOSKALSKI, RORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLBOLAN, SHAHLA $570.62 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.62, PER COURT ORDER OF 12/1/14.
